TCA Members - Example Roles: Quartile 1 band include, on average, a median entry-level software engineer, a median entry-level hardware engineer, a median entry-level business development, or a median senior hardware engineer.
Low-mid quartile roles include, on average, a median senior recruiter, a median entry-level sales engineer, a median senior data science manager, or a median senior hardware engineer.

Mid-upper quartile roles include, on average, an 75th percentile senior recruiter, a median senior data scientist, a 75th percentile senior product designer, or a median senior product design manager.

This top-paying quartile would contain high-level leadership roles including C-Suite and Vice President-level executives as well as top-tier technical roles like a 75th percentile senior security analyst, a 75th percentile senior ux researcher.
